channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: UN peacekeepers in southern Lebanon are in the crosshairs of Israel’s war on Hezbollah
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The U.N. peacekeeping mission in southern Lebanon said Israeli tanks “forcibly entered” one of its positions on Sunday, as Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu demanded it leave the area. International criticism is growing after Israeli forces have repeatedly fired on U.N.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hezbollah drone attack in Israel wounds over 60 people, some critically: reports
item.description: A drone strike in Binyamina, Israel, on Sunday injured over 60 people, some of whom were critically injured, in an attack Hezbollah has claimed responsibility for.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Drone strike in Israel wounds more than 60 as Hezbollah claims responsibility
item.description: DEIR AL-BALAH, Gaza Strip (AP) — A drone strike hit central Israel on Sunday, wounding more than 60 people, some of them critically, rescue services said, in one of the bloodiest attacks in Israel in a year of war.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Middle East latest: US says it will send THAAD defense battery to Israel, along with US troops
item.description: The U.S. is sending a Terminal High Altitude Area Defense battery to Israel, along with US troops to operate it. The Pentagon made the announcement just hours after Iran warned the U.S. to keep its military forces out of Israel.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ukraine’s human rights envoy urges response to alleged killings of Ukrainian POWs in Kursk
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — Ukraine’s human rights ombudsman urged international organizations Sunday to respond to a claim that several Ukrainian prisoners of war were executed in Russia’s Kursk region, where Kyiv had launched an incursion in August.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Netanyahu mulls plan to empty northern Gaza of civilians and cut off aid to those left inside
item.description: JERUSALEM (AP) — Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu is examining a plan to seal off humanitarian aid to northern Gaza in an attempt to starve out Hamas militants, a plan that, if implemented, could trap without food or water hundreds of thousands of Palestinians unwilling or unable to leave t
item.dc:creator: JULIA FRANKEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Macao's former top judge is elected as the Chinese casino hub's first leader born in mainland China
item.description: MACAO (AP) — Macao’s former top judge, Sam Hou Fai, was chosen as the Chinese casino hub’ s next leader in a largely ceremonial election on Sunday, setting him up to become the city’s first chief executive born in mainland China.
item.dc:creator: KANIS LEUNG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: North Korea says front-line units ready to strike South Korea if more drones appear
item.description: North Korea says its front-line army units are ready to launch strikes on South Korea after accusing its rival of flying drones over the capital Pyongyang.
item.dc:creator: Hyung-Jin Kim, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Indian politician with Bollywood ties shot dead in Mumbai weeks before key state election
item.description: Baba Siddique, 66, a senior politician in India’s financial capital Mumbai, has been fatally shot weeks before a key state election, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Columbus remains, verified after 500 years, show he was Jewish: documentary
item.description: A 22-year investigation by Spanish forensic researchers concluded that Christopher Columbus was a Sephardic Jew from Western Europe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lithuanians vote in parliamentary election with many looking for change despite a strong economy
item.description: Lithuanians are voting in the first round of parliamentary elections that could lead to the center-right governing coalition being replaced by the opposition Social Democrats and smaller center-left parties.
item.dc:creator: Liudas Dapkus, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Biden: Israel should 'absolutely' stop strikes on UN peacekeepers in Lebanon
item.description: President Biden said Friday that Israel should “absolutely” stop strikes on the U.N. peacekeepers in Lebanon, following two incidents the group was involved in this week.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Hindus in Bangladesh celebrate their largest festival under tight security following attacks
item.description: DHAKA, Bangladesh (AP) — Schoolteacher Supriya Sarker is glad to celebrate Bangladesh's largest Hindu festival of Durga Puja but feels the festivities would be more jubilant without the fear and violence that overshadow this year's event.
item.dc:creator: JULHAS ALAM and Al EMRUN GARJON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Middle East latest: Palestinian officials say 22 killed in Israeli airstrikes
item.description: The Israeli military has renewed its orders for Palestinians in the northern Gaza Strip to leave their homes and shelters as troops continue a weeklong offensive against militants.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Boris Johnson says Biden told him his family origins 'were not really Irish at all'
item.description: Boris Johnson, former United Kingdom prime minister, said President Biden told him he was not Irish, according to his new memoir "Unleashed," which was published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ashleigh Fields, The Hill

item.title: Nobel Peace Prize given to Japanese organization Nihon Hidankyo for its work against nuclear weapons
item.description: The Nobel Peace Prize was awarded Friday to Nihon Hidankyo, a Japanese organization of survivors of the U.S. atomic bombings of Hiroshima and Nagasaki, for its activism against nuclear weapons.
item.dc:creator: MIKE CORDER and ELENA BECATOROS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Activists risk their lives to rescue animals in areas of Lebanon hit by Israeli airstrikes
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — Hours after an Israeli strike destroyed a three-story building in Beirut, killing at least 10 people, Maggie Sharawi received a telephone call from a person living nearby saying that the attack had killed a cat that had several kittens.
item.dc:creator: BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stellantis CEO under fire from Italian lawmakers as the group grapples with financial troubles
item.description: ROME (AP) — Italian lawmakers on Friday questioned the head of Stellantis, the world's fourth largest automaker, over the group’s strategy, one day after it announced a management shakeup in an effort to revive sales.
item.dc:creator: GIADA ZAMPANO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Russia launches 4th aerial attack in a week against Ukraine's grain-exporting Odesa region
item.description: KYIV, Ukraine (AP) — A nighttime Russian missile strike on Odesa killed at least four people including a 16-year-old girl, regional authorities said Friday, in the latest in a series of attacks this week on the southern Ukrainian region that are likely intended to disrupt the country’s grain exports
item.dc:creator: HANNA ARHIROVA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Archaeologists unearth well-preserved 4,000-year-old Egyptian tomb
item.description: A joint Egyptian-German archaeological mission found the tomb of an ancient governor's daughter. Two tombs were found, one inside the other, covered in intricate script and art.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Iran's national airliner accused of flying weapons to Beirut airport for terror proxy Hezbollah: Report
item.description: Iran’s domestic airline, already sanctioned for support to Russia, is being accused of aiding Hezbollah by an Iranian dissident group who has called for additional sanctions to be put on the carrier.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: At least 22 killed in airstrikes in central Beirut, with Israel also firing on UN peacekeepers
item.description: The air raid on central Beirut — the deadliest in over a year of war — apparently targeted two residential buildings in separate neighborhoods.
item.dc:creator: BILAL HUSSEIN, WAFAA SHURAFA and SAMY MAGDY, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Dozens wounded, at least 22 killed in airstrikes in Beirut as tensions escalate in Israel conflict with Iran
item.description: At least 22 people were killed and dozens of others left wounded in airstrikes in central Beirut, further escalating Israel’s deadly conflict with Iran-backed Hezbollah militants in Lebanon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: British YouTuber and rapper Yung Filly is charged with raping and choking a woman in Australia
item.description: PERTH, Australia (AP) — A British YouTuber and rapper known as Yung Filly has been charged with raping and choking a woman in a hotel room following an Australian music performance.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Yemen’s Houthi rebels attack a Liberian-flagged ship in the Red Sea
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Yemen's Houthi rebels attacked a Liberian-flagged chemical tanker on Thursday in the Red Sea, authorities said.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Brown votes against student proposal to divest from companies allegedly connected to war in Gaza
item.description: Brown University announced Thursday it will not divest from companies that pro-Palestinian students say contribute to Israel's war efforts in Gaza.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: Israel continues to weigh options, timing on Iran strike following Biden-Netanyahu call
item.description: President Biden and Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu held a call that in part focused on Iran's recent missile attack on the Jewish state, and reportedly how Israel intends to retaliate.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israel seeks to reshape Middle East, with force and US backing
item.description: One year after Hamas’s Oct. 7 attack, Israel is reshaping the Middle East by force, taking the fight to Iran and its proxies with the help of the United States — despite pleas from the Biden administration for diplomacy.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, The Hill

item.title: Canadian woman charged with killing 3 people in 3 days, labeled a serial killer
item.description: A Canadian woman allegedly killed three people in separate incidents over three days in and around Toronto, authorities said last week.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: North Korea vows to block border with South Korea and build front-line defense structures
item.description: To cope with 'confrontational hysteria' by U.S. and South Korean forces, North Korea said it will block its border with South Korea permanently and will cut off railways and roads to the country.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Kremlin confirms Trump sent COVID tests to Putin during pandemic
item.description: The Kremlin confirmed that former President Trump while in office sent Russian President Vladimir Putin COVID-19 testing devices during the height of the pandemic.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, WGN 9

item.title: North Korea’s Kim Jong Un pushes goal to become nuclear powerhouse in warning to South Korea
item.description: Kim Jong Un issued his second ominous message, saying he plans to make Pyongyang a top nuclear player and expand its capabilities in face of South Korea-U.S. partnership.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Russian court sentences a 72-year-old American to nearly 7 years in prison for fighting in Ukraine
item.description: MOSCOW (AP) — A Russian court on Monday sentenced a 72-year-old American in a closed trial to nearly seven years in prison for allegedly fighting as a mercenary in Ukraine.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
